data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Member-only pricing and early access', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions tiered memberships but does not specify any member-only pricing or early access features, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the evidence does not include any endpoints or entities that demonstrate how member-only pricing is implemented or how early access is granted, leading to a conclusion that this requirement is not met.
gaps: Missing implementation details for member-only pricing and early access.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define member-only pricing and early access endpoints
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that member-only pricing and early access features are implemented and accessible.
